title: Blue Dreams
description: Best Blue Crystal PVP pack. Embrace the Sky and Soar. 16x >.Ft short sword, Small shield, low fire and small totem
body:
## **❓ What is it?**

Transports yourself into a whimsical world where every detail is infused with various shades of blue. Designed with a love for the serene and the surreal, "Blue Dreams" reimagines the Minecraft universe, offering an airy and fun experience that feels like stepping into a dream. This pack was made by KlasClaws

## **📦 Features:**

- ANIMATED INVENTORY!!!
- Custom Hotbar, Gui and Textures.
- Reduces sizes of golden apples, totems, shields, fire and more.
- No Explosion Particles
- Compatible with versions 1.6.1-1.20.4+( 1.9+ is most recommended )
- Compatible with Sodium and Optifine.
- Focuses mainly on an enhanced CPVP and SMP Experience

## **🙋‍♂️ Questions:**

### Does Blue Dreams work with Shaders?
- Should work if the shader doesn't change in-game textures I use shaders all the time
and prefer it with shaders (MakeUp-Ultra fast is my preference)
### Am I allowed to use this pack in a video, live stream, or "post"?
- Yes, I would be honored. If you could provide credit to the pack I would appreciate it 
but it is not required

## **📜 Credits:**

- KlasClaws for pack creation, design, and ownership
- Shaders from Gallery pictures is MakeUp UltraFast 8.8
- Map for gallery images is an edited world made by VanoraPacks
